hero.h1: Locking pouches for mobile phones for primary and secondary schools

steps.label: 1. Insert
steps.description: The student places their phone into the Kapslock pouch before class begins.

steps.label: 2. Lock
steps.description: The pouch locks with a simple motion using a hidden magnetic mechanism.

steps.label: 3. Unlock as needed
steps.description: During the day, pouches can only be unlocked using a special magnet, according to school rules.

about.title: Meet Kapslock
about.p1: Kapslock is a system of locking pouches and magnetic unlocking elements designed for primary and secondary schools. It allows mobile phone use to be restricted during lessons without needing to take devices away from students.
about.p2: The solution is simple, safe and flexible. Phones stay with students at all times but are locked in the pouch and can only be unlocked using a special magnet.
about.p3: The system is also more sustainable. Responsibility for devices remains with the students, not the school. Schools no longer gather large numbers of phones in one place, minimising the risk of loss and the associated liability for staff.
bullets: Choose the mode that suits your school
about.msmtCalloutTitle: Kapslock is aligned with the MŠMT Methodology (2026)
about.msmtCalloutSub: The Ministry of Education recommends magnetically lockable pouches → Learn more

products.title: Kapslock Products
products.subtitle: A selection of available variants. We will prepare a detailed offer and recommended set tailored to you.
products.modesSubtitle: Choose the approach based on your school's regime and the level of flexibility for teachers.

modes.label: 1) Standard mode
modes.description: The school orders pouches and 1–2 fixed magnets, typically installed at the building entrance.

modes.label: 2) Flexible mode
modes.description: The school orders pouches, 1–2 fixed magnets, and several portable magnets (e.g. one per staff room).

modes.label: 3) Maximum freedom for teachers
modes.description: The school orders pouches, 1–2 fixed magnets, and a portable magnet for every teacher — so they can unlock whenever the lesson requires it.

legislation.heroTitle: Kapslock aligned with the MŠMT Methodology
legislation.heroSubtitle: In February 2026, the Czech Ministry of Education published a methodology on regulating mobile phones in schools. Kapslock is one of the recommended solutions.
legislation.section1Title: What does the MŠMT Methodology (2026) say?
legislation.section1p1: In February 2026, the Czech Ministry of Education, Youth and Sports published guidelines for setting rules on the use of mobile phones and other electronic devices in schools, recommending specific ways for schools to regulate mobile phone use during lessons.
legislation.section1p2: The methodology gives schools an overview of possible approaches — from internal rules to physical solutions such as lockable pouches. Magnetically lockable pouches are among the specifically described solutions.
legislation.section2Title: Magnetically lockable pouches as a recommended solution
legislation.quote: The student places their device into a magnetically lockable pouch upon entering school, which can only be unlocked at an unlocking station upon leaving school.
legislation.section2body: The methodology states that this system allows schools to effectively limit disruptive phone use during lessons, while the phone stays with the student at all times and the school does not need to manage central collection or storage.
legislation.section3Title: How Kapslock addresses one of the noted drawbacks
legislation.drawbackText: The methodology notes one potential drawback: the phone cannot be immediately used during lessons — for example for educational apps or other learning activities.
legislation.solutionText: Kapslock solves this with portable magnetic unlockers for teachers. Any teacher can open the pouch at any time and use the device for educational apps or other learning activities. Schools gain control while preserving full flexibility.
legislation.ctaSectionTitle: Interested in Kapslock for your school?
legislation.ctaSectionBody: We will prepare a tailored offer. Just get in touch.

footer.tagline: Interested in introducing Kapslock at your school? Get in touch and we'll prepare a tailored offer.
